'''zahatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylomannan|xylomannan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-h-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylomannan|xylomannan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zahatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæhæthæth|zæhæthæth]] || [[word:zæhæthæj|zæhæthæj]] || [[word:zæhæthæsh|zæhæthæsh]] || [[word:zæhæthæ|zæhæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zahahathath|zahahathath]] || [[word:zahahathaj|zahahathaj]] || [[word:zahahathash|zahahathash]] || [[word:zahahatha|zahahatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zahathath|zahathath]] || [[word:zahathaj|zahathaj]] || [[word:zahathash|zahathash]] || [[word:zahatha|zahatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zahafthath|zahafthath]] || [[word:zahafthaj|zahafthaj]] || [[word:zahafthash|zahafthash]] || [[word:zahafthaf|zahafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zahathatha|zahathatha]] || [[word:zahathaja|zahathaja]] || [[word:zahathasha|zahathasha]] || [[word:zahathaka|zahathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zahathath|zahathath]] || [[word:zahathaj|zahathaj]] || [[word:zahathash|zahathash]] || [[word:zahatha|zahatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zahathathal|zahathathal]] || [[word:zahathajal|zahathajal]] || [[word:zahathashal|zahathashal]] || [[word:zahathakal|zahathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zahathathatha|zahathathatha]] || [[word:zahathajaja|zahathajaja]] || [[word:zahathashasha|zahathashasha]] || [[word:zahathaka|zahathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zahathathan|zahathathan]] || [[word:zahathajan|zahathajan]] || [[word:zahathashan|zahathashan]] || [[word:zahathakan|zahathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zahathathaoro|zahathathaoro]] || [[word:zahathajaoro|zahathajaoro]] || [[word:zahathashaoro|zahathashaoro]] || [[word:zahathakaoro|zahathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
